title: Nalco Holdings Services is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Nalco Holdings Services is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Nalco Holdings Services in Ludhiana is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nalco Holdings Services:
Nalco Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nalco Holdings Services!
